rag_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid scopes (component type or implementation) and use only visible features or eq helpers declared in the same annex.
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use eq helpers to declare boolean expressions, such as range checks.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type annexes and implementation annexes
